tools.name: create_support_ticket_draft
tools.title: Create support ticket draft
tools.description: Creates a draft support ticket from the user's issue description. The user must confirm before the ticket is submitted.

issueSummary.description: Short summary of the user's support issue.

tools.name: get_user_ticket_status
tools.title: Get user ticket status
tools.description: Returns open support ticket statuses for the requesting user only.

requestingUserId.description: Slack user ID for the user requesting ticket status.

tools.name: archive_support_ticket
tools.title: Archive support ticket
tools.description: Archives a support ticket after explicit user confirmation and only if the requester owns the ticket.

confirmedByUser.description: Must be true only after the user confirms the archive action in Slack.
